title: Apex Builder Inputs
description: Typed inputs for the apex-builder agent. This schema is the machine-readable form of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The run_builder.py harness validates every caller-supplied input packet against this file before Gate A is marked complete. If validation fails, the harness emits the exact list of missing or invalid fields as a question packet the caller must answer before any code is written.

kind.description: Which Apex surface the builder emits. Determines the class list in AGENT.md Plan Step 2.

feature_summary.description: Plain-English statement of what the feature does. Must be at least ten words so the builder has enough signal to decompose the feature; shorter inputs trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.
feature_summary.example: Nightly Account hierarchy rebuild triggered when Parent changes for large families.

feature_token.description: PascalCase noun that forms the stem of every emitted class name (e.g., AccountHierarchyRebuild → AccountHierarchyRebuildQueueable). Required when kind is not trigger/selector/domain (which name off primary_sobject). Must match ^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9]+$.

primary_sobject.description: API name of the primary SObject the code operates on. Required for kind in {trigger, selector, domain, batch, cdc_subscriber}; optional otherwise. Must match an SObject returned by describe_org during Gate B.

referenced_fields.description: Explicit list of SObject.Field API names the emitted code will read or write. Every entry MUST be grounded at Gate B via describe_sobject. Omitting a field that the emitted code uses is a Gate B failure, so list every custom field the feature requires.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into every .cls-meta.xml. Defaults to 60.0 if the caller does not specify.

namespace.description: Managed package namespace prefix. Leave blank or null for non-packaged orgs.

include_logger.description: Whether every emitted class wires through templates/apex/ApplicationLogger.cls. Default true; set false only when the caller has an explicit reason (e.g., preview class in a scratch).

test_bulk_size.description: How many records the generated test inserts for its bulk path. Default 200 (governor-limit sentinel). Must be 1..10000.

async_hint.description: For async kinds (batch/queueable/schedulable/platform_event_subscriber/cdc_subscriber/continuation), governor-limit sizing hint. Conservative = batch size 50; Standard = 200; High = 2000 for Batchable only.

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org Gate B will probe with describe_org / list_custom_objects. Optional — when absent the builder runs in library-only mode and forces confidence to at most MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative path to the caller's force-app source tree. Gate C writes emitted classes under <repo_path>/main/default/classes/ and triggers under <repo_path>/main/default/triggers/. Defaults to ./force-app.

sharing_mode.description: Sharing keyword for the emitted classes. with_sharing is the default; without_sharing requires a caller-supplied justification in business_justification or Gate D refuses with REFUSAL_SECURITY_GUARD.

business_justification.description: Required iff sharing_mode == without_sharing. One-paragraph business reason the builder copies verbatim into a header comment on the emitted class. Must be at least 40 characters.
